Home › Insights › Eight Years of A+ness
Brand

Eight Years of A+ness

May 6, 2024
BPD Certified by Great Place to Work® for Eighth Year in a Row! Great Place To Work® is the global authority on workplace culture, employee experience, and the leadership behaviors proven to deliver market-leading revenue, employee retention and increased innovation. We pride ourselves on this because the GPTW certification is based entirely on our employees' feedback, reflecting their experiences in various areas including company culture, environment, benefits, development, engagement, and perks.

“This certification is incredibly exciting and emphasizes our unwavering commitment to BPDerrrs satisfaction year after year." - Vanessa Anderson, EVP Agency Operations

As an integrated marketing services firm, the culture of our company directly impacts our client relationships. Jessica Schmidt, President of BPD, speaks on the importance of this, and how it fosters an exceptional client experience. “We take pride in being home to top talent with a deep passion for healthcare and a dedication to excellence. Our company culture fosters employee longevity, which has led to a uniquely high standard of service. Inspired by the Ritz-Carlton, yet uniquely our own, BPD's approach ensures that our BPDerrrs are great thinkers are at the forefront of important conversations within the healthcare industry. This exceptional team is the cornerstone of our success, and I am incredibly proud of what we have achieved together.” As the home for healthcare’s leading brands, we’re proud to foster a workplace where our employees and clients can continue to grow and learn – and even have some fun along the way. In the words of BPDerrrs, here are some things that contribute to this: We are honored to receive this recognition for the eighth year in a row. Stay tuned for year nine!
